title: Review pass 2: full project re-scan
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — no new surface area this pass. All findings are pre-existing classification bugs or stale comments. No architectural issues.
Confidence: 90% chance no missed bugs. Two fixes applied: aws-sm throttling classification, doppler zeroization gap. Uncertainty driven by: untested backends (azure-kv, bitwarden, doppler, gcp-sm) where error paths cannot be exercised without live credentials. Would raise confidence if: integration tests run against those services.
